title: Verify Gemini capability and sandbox boundary
goal: Verify whether Gemini can be used as local proposal-only review capacity before it is treated as an operational review lane.

metadata.safety_boundary: preflight only; no dispatch, merge, runtime mutation, repository mutation by Gemini, or automatic queue mutation
metadata.write_scope: Bureau documentation or task evidence only; Gemini runner itself receives no repository write authority.
metadata.outcome: Bureau PR #213 added a Gemini proposal-lane preflight. It observed the local Gemini executable, --print and --sandbox support, documented allowed inputs, sensitive exclusions and forbidden authority, and kept the Gemini lane disabled because auth/quota was not observed.

verified_acceptance.availability-observed: docs/reports/gemini-preflight-2026-07-08.json records binary found true for /home/alex/.local/bin/gemini and observed --version/--help metadata.
verified_acceptance.noninteractive-mode: The report records noninteractiveModeObserved true with --print and outputCapturePath stdout_json_or_bounded_stdout.
verified_acceptance.context-boundary: docs/gemini-proposal-lane-preflight-v1.md and the report list allowed inputs, sensitive exclusions and forbidden authority.
verified_acceptance.no-agent-effect: The preflight only observes executable metadata, sends no repo content or prompts to Gemini, keeps all effect flags false and laneEnabled false.
verified_acceptance.lane-dependency: The report status is blocked_pending_auth_quota_review, so the Gemini review lane must not be treated as active capacity yet.
verified_acceptance.bureau-write-scope: Writes are limited to Bureau documentation, report, tests and preflight code; Gemini itself receives no repository write capability.

checks: Bureau PR #213 validate (3.10) SUCCESS before merge
Bureau PR #213 validate (3.12) SUCCESS before merge
local: ruff check src tests pyproject.toml OK
local: bureau-gemini-preflight generated report with laneEnabled false and auth_quota_not_observed blocker

acceptance.assertion: Gemini runner availability is observed, or unavailability is recorded as a blocker.
A non-interactive execution mode and output capture path are documented or blocked.
The preflight documents which inputs Gemini may inspect and which sensitive values are excluded.
The preflight does not run Gemini with write, push, merge, runtime or repository mutation authority.
The later Gemini review lane is not treated as active capacity until this preflight is accepted.
Any write claim is limited to Bureau evidence or documentation updates by Grabowski; Gemini itself receives no repository write capability.
